# Reset Password

Customers can initiate a password-reset from the sign-in page via "Forgot password". New passwords must be at least 10 characters and include uppercase letters, lowercase letters, and digits (see password-requirements). After 5 consecutive failed login attempts, the account is locked for 30 minutes under the account-lockout policy; completing a password reset unlocks it early.

[Source: account_help.md#reset-password]
